name: devspace-manager
description: Start, verify, and delegate coding tasks through a local DevSpace MCP bridge for ChatGPT coding sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Manage DevSpace MCP and ChatGPT delegation.
interface.longDescription: DevSpace Manager installs a repeatable Codex workflow for launching, stopping, verifying, and delegating coding tasks through a local DevSpace MCP server exposed through a controlled HTTPS tunnel for ChatGPT connector use.
interface.defaultPrompt: Start DevSpace for this workspace and verify the connector URL.
